case_title: 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC VS. XOCHITL CAZADOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC REPRESENTED BY HASMIK NAZARI PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT XOCHITL CAZADOR IS PRESENT. WITNESS MARK SNODGRASS DEFENDANT HUSBAND. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAZADOR, XOCHITL $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
